name: Nano Banana Pro Prompts Recommend
description: AI skill for OpenClaw & Claude Code that recommends from 10,000+ Nano Banana Pro (Gemini) image prompts. Features smart search by use case, content remix mode, and sample images. Automated twice-daily updates keep the prompt library current.
review: Sophisticated prompt recommendation service with 10,000+ curated prompts for Gemini image generation. Automated twice-daily updates, grep-optimized search, and content remix mode make this an exemplary skill. Highly starred (1160+) with exceptional maintenance cadence.

drax_results.notes: 10,000+ prompt library with automated updates, smart search, and content remix mode verified.
